title: Build a full stack app with Antigravity voice prompts & sub-agents
summary: Google Antigravity enables developers to build full-stack applications by orchestrating teams of AI sub-agents through single voice prompts. The demo shows a multilingual note-taking app built using Vite, Go, SQLite, and Docker Compose with code generation and local testing capabilities.
writeup: The video demonstrates Google Antigravity, a platform that turns voice prompts into orchestration commands for teams of AI sub-agents handling full-stack development. The walkthrough builds a multilingual note-taking app, using a Vite frontend, a Go and SQLite backend, and Docker Compose for orchestration. It shows how natural language interfaces and multi-agent code generation combine to produce a working application across frontend, backend, and deployment layers.
